blocks.text: Thank you both for the records that came through last week. Jason and I have made a first pass over them, and the current-state map of how work moves through Scott, Smith and Edwards is starting to take shape. Nothing in it changes the scope we agreed. A few of the stage timings do look longer than the operating summary suggested, which is exactly the sort of gap the diagnostic is meant to surface, so we will want to confirm those figures with your team before we treat them as settled.

Two things would help us keep to pace. First, we are missing the volume figures for the final two months of last year; our read of the {{fact:f:E-2020-001.client}} data has a gap there that we would like to fill with the actual numbers before we build on it. Second, we would like to observe a live service handoff before the next working session, so that the map reflects how the work actually runs and not only how the records describe it. If someone on your side can point us to the right team, we will arrange it around their schedule.
I will send the draft current-state map ahead of our next session so the discussion starts from a shared picture. Jason will confirm the session date separately once your calendars are set.
